hero.subtitle: Exclusively Sri Lanka
hero.title_part1: Sri Lanka's Best Travel Agency for
hero.description: Experience the pinnacle of hospitality in the heart of the Indian Ocean. From private villas to VIP handling, Nilathra Travels defines Sri Lankan luxury.

home.brand_subtitle: A team of hoteliers and planters operating since 2012
home.brand_p1: The "Nilathra" vision was born from a passion to showcase Sri Lanka in its purest, most elegant form. We believe that true luxury is not just about the finest hotels or the most expensive cars—it's about the access to authentic, soul-stirring experiences that remain etched in memory.
home.brand_p2: Our name, Nilathra, signifies the "Blue Horizon" where the sky meets the Indian Ocean—a symbol of the infinite possibilities our team of hoteliers and planters creates for every guest. Based in Colombo, we have evolved from a boutique concierge to a world-class travel architect, serving a global elite who demand authenticity, privacy, and impeccable security.
home.brand_p3: We don't just book hotels; we build relationships. We don't just plan routes; we curate narratives. Every itinerary we design is a living masterplan, analyzing traveler personas down to the finest detail to architect the perfect memory of the island.
home.stand_desc: Discover the three core pillars that define our commitment to world-class hospitality and uncompromising service excellence.
home.seo_p1: As the leading luxury travel agency in Sri Lanka, Nilathra Collection specializes in curating experiences that transcend the ordinary. Our deep-rooted heritage in the island's hospitality sector allows us to open doors that remain closed to others, from private sunset viewings at the Sigiriya Rock Fortress to exclusive tea tastings in the misty valleys of Nuwara Eliya.
home.seo_p2: Whether you are seeking the wild heart of Yala National Park for a leopard safari or the colonial elegance of Galle Fort, our travel architects design every moment with precision. We understand that for the high-net-worth traveler, time is the ultimate currency. That is why our itineraries prioritize efficiency without sacrificing depth.
home.seo_p3: Our collections—Ultra VIP, Luxury, and Premium—are designed to cater to varying levels of intensity and exclusivity. We invite you to explore our bespoke Sri Lanka tour packages, each a blank canvas ready to be painted with your specific desires. Let Nilathra Collection be your compass to the Pearl of the Indian Ocean.
home.faq_desc: Everything you need to know about planning your luxury odyssey in Sri Lanka.

faqs.q: What makes Nilathra's Ultra VIP package different from standard luxury travel?
faqs.a: Standard luxury focus on hotels; Ultra VIP focus on sovereignty. We provide jet-side tarmac clearance, standby helicopters, and total estate buyouts. You don't just stay in a hotel; you own the property for the duration of your stay, supported by a 6-member chef team and absolute security detail.

faqs.q: How does Nilathra ensure the security of international high-profile guests?
faqs.a: We employ highly trained Close Protection Details (CPD) and utilize B6/B7 armored vehicles for ground movement. Our logistical planning ensures discreet entry and exit points, and we work under strict Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs) to protect our clients' identities at all times.

faqs.q: Can I customize a journey that blends different luxury tiers?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Our 'Mixed Collection' is specifically designed for total fluidity. You might choose Ultra VIP transport with Luxury Collection resort stays, or balance the intensity of cultural exploration with the serenity of a 5-star spa retreat. We architect the masterplan around your specific rhythm.

faqs.q: Is Sri Lanka a suitable destination for family luxury travel?
faqs.a: Sri Lanka is exceptional for families. Our Premium and Luxury plans offer spacious multi-room suites, child-friendly logistics, and curated educational experiences such as turtle hatchery visits and junior ranger safari programs, all managed with 24/7 driver-guide support.

faqs.q: What is the best time of year to visit Sri Lanka for a luxury escape?
faqs.a: Sri Lanka is a year-round destination thanks to its dual monsoon system. For the South and West coasts (Galle, Colombo, Yala), the ideal window is December to April. For the East coast and ancient cities, May to September offers pristine weather. We adjust your itinerary to match the best seasonal horizons.

home.quote: "An unparalleled experience. From the private villa in Ella to the seamless VIP handling at Colombo, Nilathra Collection exceeded every expectation. True Sri Lankan luxury."
home.cta_subtitle: Begin Your Journey with the Best
home.cta_desc: Each itinerary is a blank canvas. Let the top travel agency in Sri Lanka design your perfect private escape.

itinerary.title: Jet-Side Arrival: Elite
itinerary.description: Direct jet-side greeting with private concierge and traditional welcome ceremony. Skip the terminal entirely as your security team escorts you.

itinerary.title: Armored Command Transit
itinerary.description: 24/7 Close Protection Detail (CPD) with armored SUV escort for all ground movements between flight segments.

itinerary.title: Total Aerial Domain
itinerary.description: A dedicated helicopter and crew remain on standby for the duration of your trip, ensuring travel at the speed of thought.

itinerary.title: Sovereign Sanctuary
itinerary.description: Total buyout of a private island or estate. 1:1 staff-to-guest ratio including private physician, chef, and master butler.

itinerary.title: Zero-Trace Departure

signature.desc: Seven days. Seven extraordinary chapters. One island, experienced in its entirety at the highest level.

itinerary.title: Luxury Beach Escape

signature.desc: Seven days. Seven chapters of the real Sri Lanka — ancient cities, misty highlands, surf, and the warmth of Galle Fort.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Colombo
itinerary.experience: Welcome to Sri Lanka. The city greets you with colour, energy, and flavour.
highlights: Colombo city tour by private SUV
Street food tasting in Pettah market
itinerary.note: Ease into the island. Let Colombo come to you.

itinerary.title: Drive North to the Ancient Kingdom
itinerary.experience: A scenic morning drive into the heart of the Cultural Triangle.
highlights: Morning premium SUV ride to Sigiriya
Boat ride on a local village lake
Traditional village lunch on the water

itinerary.title: Sunrise, Rock & Sky
itinerary.experience: The most unforgettable day — from the sky to the summit.
highlights: Pre-dawn hike to Pidurangala for sunrise
Private guided climb of Sigiriya Lion Rock
Hot air balloon ride & sky lunch
itinerary.note: This day is the heart of the journey.

itinerary.title: The Sacred Hill Capital
itinerary.experience: Kandy — where history, faith, and beauty converge.
highlights: Drive to Kandy via cultural sites
Private guided visit to the Temple of the Sacred Tooth

itinerary.title: The Scenic Train to Ella
itinerary.experience: One of the world's most beautiful train journeys — through mist, tea, and cloud.
highlights: Scenic railway journey through the highlands
Evening hike to Little Adam's Peak
itinerary.note: Let the highlands slow you down.

itinerary.title: Waves, Surf & Soul
itinerary.experience: The south coast in all its laid-back, sun-soaked glory.
highlights: Private surf lesson on the bay
Fresh seafood lunch by the ocean
itinerary.note: This day is about presence, not pace.

itinerary.title: Homeward via the Fort City
itinerary.experience: A leisurely farewell through one of Asia's most storied colonial cities.
highlights: Visit ancient Dutch churches and ramparts
Street food tour — hoppers, kottu & lime juice
Scenic coastal drive back to Colombo
itinerary.note: End of journey. Sri Lanka at its finest.

destinations.subtitle: Exquisite Locations
destinations.title: Iconic Destinations
destinations.desc: From the misty Highlands to the pristine Southern coast, explore Sri Lanka's most prestigious locations through the lens of luxury and exclusivity.

vip.hero_desc: The pinnacle of luxury travel. Experience the diversity of an entire continent, curated exclusively for the world's most discerning travelers.
vip.pitch_p1: While the Maldives offers pristine beaches curated by our very own Sri Lankan hospitality experts, Sri Lanka offers an experience that transcends mere relaxation.
vip.pitch_p2: Imagine a land not quite as vast as India, yet encompassing the entirety of India's breathtaking diversity within a compact 65,610 square kilometers. Here, luxury is defined not just by opulent resorts, but by unparalleled access to diverse worlds, seamlessly woven together.
vip.symphony_desc: Begin your morning with yoga on a sun-drenched beach, ascend to the misty mountains for a colonial high tea, and conclude your day dining under a canopy of stars.

climates.title: Morning: Coastal Sun
climates.desc: Awake to the rhythmic crashing of the Indian Ocean from your secluded private villa.

climates.title: Noon: Emerald Wetlands
climates.desc: Helicopter to the lush interior, discovering hidden waterfalls and vibrant rainforests.

climates.title: Evening: Golden Dry Lands
climates.desc: Dine under ancient skies in the cultural triangle, surrounded by millennia of history.

vip.heritage_desc: Walk among 6000-year-old burial sites, trace the engineering marvels of ancient reservoirs, and gaze upon the majestic Sigiriya.
vip.heritage_text: Our culture is an unbroken lineage, alive with the mesmerizing rhythms of traditional dances and rituals that have safeguarded our people for millennia. Experience heritage that treats you not just as a guest, but as royalty.
vip.wildlife_desc: Private safaris granting you exclusive access to the heart of the wild.
vip.culinary_desc: Elevate your palate. Savor hand-picked native delicacies bursting with unique island spices, prepared by world-renowned executive chefs in exclusive settings.

compare.title: Need help deciding?
compare.desc: View a detailed side-by-side comparison of all features, properties, and inclusions to find your perfect match.

essentials.title: Travel Essentials
essentials.desc: Before embarking on your journey, ensure all necessary travel documents are in order. Most visitors to Sri Lanka require an Electronic Travel Authorization (ETA).
essentials.visa_desc: For guaranteed processing and standard rates, always use the official Sri Lankan Government portal.

items.a: Yes! You can upgrade at any time. The price difference will be calculated based on remaining nights and availability of properties.
International flights are not included in the base packages, but our concierge team can assist with booking both commercial and private charter flights.
Standard and Deluxe plans offer free cancellation up to 30 days before arrival. The VIP plan provides extended flexibility depending on specific property policies.
Absolutely! Each tier serves as a foundation. Once you select a tier, you can customize destinations, activities, and the duration of your stay.

cta.title: Not sure which plan is right for you? Our local travel specialists are here to guide you.
